title: Creator Interview → ProfileGen (reference vertical slice)
description: Reference vertical slice per ADR-0013: a creator onboards through a Weave AI interview that produces a generated profile. Exercises the full agentic loop end-to-end and spans packages ai + db + ui + core, wired in apps/web. First backlog for the firstmate-only workflow.

title: db: schema + migration for users, creator_profiles, and profile embeddings

title: Install + auth gh CLI for no-mistakes PR/CI steps
description: no-mistakes doctor shows gh not found; the gate's push→PR→CI steps need it (local review/test/lint/document steps work without it). Required before firstmate Phase 3, where crewmates ship through the no-mistakes PR flow. Note existing workflow opens PRs via GitHub REST API + git credential fill (remote jwhector/resonance).

title: Install + wire firstmate (Phase 3 orchestration)
description: Install firstmate; set project mode no-mistakes with treehouse backend; enable SubagentStop matcher in loop-guard. Turns the manual one-agent loop into fan-out (one crewmate per package). See docs/agentic-workflow.md.

title: Add ~/.bun/bin to crewmate shell PATH
description: ml/sd live in ~/.bun/bin, not on non-interactive shell PATH; firstmate crewmates would silently no-op the ml/sd prime hooks. Ensure the env used for crewmate shells sources ~/.bun/bin. Blocks firstmate.

title: Install lavish CLI for the ship-slice review handoff
description: lavish is available as a skill; install the CLI (npx skills add kunchenguid/lavish-axi) to enable the annotate-and-send-feedback loop used in ship-slice Phase 3.

title: Integrate deep-module design tenet across the workflow (ADR + conventions + recipes + planning + review + prompts)
description: Weave the deep-module design tenet (module/interface/depth/seam/adapter vocabulary; see .claude/skills/module-design) into every workflow juncture. Full plan + juncture map + kickoff in docs/module-design-integration-handoff.md. Decompose via /feature Phase 1 (sd plan) in a fresh session — context ran large in the authoring session.

title: adr: write ADR-0017 'Design deep modules' (vocabulary + principles + the boundary/seam and model-ahead-ports resolutions); add its README row; add the mulch architecture reference record; update SKILL.md's 'provisional' note to point at the ratified ADR
